cotton.growth_notes: Needs warm weather, good drainage, and careful pest monitoring from vegetative stage to boll formation.

rice.growth_notes: Needs standing water during early growth, timely transplanting, and drainage before harvest.

wheat.growth_notes: Performs best in cool winter weather with irrigation at crown root initiation, flowering, and grain filling.

maize.growth_notes: Needs good drainage, nitrogen support, and moisture during tasseling and grain filling.

soybean.growth_notes: Needs well-drained soil, seed treatment, and weed control in the first 30 to 40 days.

chilli.growth_notes: Needs well-drained soil, steady moisture, and close monitoring for sucking pests and fruit rot.

sugarcane.growth_notes: Long duration crop needing regular irrigation, earthing up, and balanced nutrition.

groundnut.growth_notes: Needs loose soil for pod formation and careful irrigation during flowering and pegging.
